name: Mistral AI
description: Mistral AI provides cutting-edge AI models and platforms for organizations to build custom AI systems, agents, and applications with full data control.

name: Alice & Bob
description: Alice & Bob builds fault-tolerant quantum computers using Cat Qubits, a qubit design with built-in error correction to reduce decoherence.

name: Lexroom
description: Lexroom is an AI-powered legal platform for professionals offering legal research, document analysis, clause drafting, and verified citations.

name: PAL Robotics
description: PAL Robotics designs and develops humanoid and mobile robots for research, healthcare, AI, and industry, with 20+ years of experience.

name: Voltrac
description: Voltrac develops autonomous electric tractors for agriculture and military logistics, featuring swappable batteries and all-wheel drive.

name: Electrogenos
description: Electrogenos manufactures electrolysers for green hydrogen production using a unique process that cuts costs and reduces factory deployment times.

name: Invertix
description: AI-driven renewable energy operating system using autonomous agents to audit telemetry, automate O&M, and ensure financial compliance for solar portfolios.

name: L'AI platform per le Operations Ospedaliere
description: Hisy is an AI platform for hospital operations that digitalizes waiting lists, surgical planning, and pre-admission scheduling to streamline workflows.

name: Helsing
description: Helsing is a defense AI company developing artificial intelligence software for European security and defense applications.
